metadata.description: Claude Code plugins shared from JOS's gists repo.

plugins.name: faust
plugins.description: FAUST DSP skill: distilled language reference plus compile-clean idiomatic examples for writing, reading, and debugging .dsp code.

plugins.name: git-replay
plugins.description: Replay a repo's commit messages as a forward-moving story: an overview prologue, one full-message card per commit, and a recursive day/week/month outline for large histories.

plugins.name: handoff
plugins.description: Compact the current session into a HandoffPrompt-<date>-<Topic>.md at the repo root: state, next task, blast radius, traps already paid for, and invariants -- so a fresh agent resumes cold.
